# Issue Report

## 📋 Issue Description

<!-- Clearly describe the issue, feature request, or question -->

## 🎯 Type of Issue

<!-- Check the relevant item by replacing [ ] with [x] -->

- [ ] 🐛 Bug Report (something is broken)
- [ ] ✨ Feature Request (new functionality)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation (documentation improvement)
- [ ] ❓ Question (need help or clarification)
- [ ] 🔧 Enhancement (improvement to existing feature)
- [ ] 🚀 Performance (performance-related issue)
- [ ] 🔒 Security (security vulnerability)
- [ ] 💡 Idea/Discussion (brainstorming)

## 🔄 Current Behavior

<!-- For bugs: describe what currently happens -->
<!-- For features: describe current limitations -->

## ✅ Expected Behavior

<!-- Describe what you expected to happen -->
<!-- For features: describe the desired functionality -->

## 🔀 Steps to Reproduce

<!-- For bugs: provide step-by-step reproduction -->

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## 💻 Environment

<!-- Fill in relevant information -->

- **OS**: <!-- e.g., Windows 10, macOS 12.1, Ubuntu 20.04 -->
- **Browser**: <!-- e.g., Chrome 96, Firefox 95, Safari 15 -->
- **Version**: <!-- e.g., v1.2.3 -->
- **Node.js**: <!-- e.g., v16.13.0 (if applicable) -->
- **Device**: <!-- e.g., Desktop, Mobile, Tablet -->

## 📱 Screenshots/Videos

<!-- If applicable, add screenshots or videos to help explain the issue -->

## 🔗 Related Issues/PRs

<!-- Link any related issues or pull requests -->

## 📝 Additional Context

<!-- Add any other context, logs, error messages, or relevant information -->

### Error Logs (if applicable):

```
<!-- Paste error logs or stack traces here -->
```

### Code Examples (if applicable):

```javascript
// Paste relevant code snippets here
```

## ✅ Issue Checklist

<!-- Check all items before submitting -->

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to avoid duplicates
- [ ] I have provided a clear description
- [ ] I have included relevant environment information
- [ ] I have added screenshots/videos (if UI-related)
- [ ] I have included error logs (if applicable)
- [ ] I have provided steps to reproduce (for bugs)

### 📌 For Maintainers:

<!-- This section is for project maintainers to fill during triage -->

**Priority**: <!-- Low / Medium / High / Critical -->
**Labels**: <!-- Add relevant labels -->

> 💡 **Tip**: The more details you provide, the faster we can help you!
